title: How a man of God handles the hard conversation
caption:
Most men handle hard conversations one of two ways: they blow up or they disappear.

A man walking with God finds a third option — go to him, gently, directly, for the sake of the relationship. Not because it's comfortable. Because it's the loving thing.

Jesus wept before He confronted. That sequence is instructive. You bring your grief over the gap, not your argument. You speak from 'for you,' not 'against you.' You say the thing that needs to be said, and then you give God what you can't carry — which is the outcome.

Being hard on yourself and gentle with others isn't a personality type. It's a learned practice. And it's the shape of Christ-like love.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #conflict #loveoneanother #leadership #christianity
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
